lean_statement:
theorem sum_range_choose_eq_pow_two (n : ℕ) :
    (∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), Nat.choose n k) = 2 ^ n
proof:
Proof: apply the binomial theorem to `(1 + 1)^n`. It gives
`(1 + 1)^n = ∑_{k=0}^n (n choose k) 1^k 1^(n-k) = ∑_{k=0}^n (n choose k)`.
Since `(1 + 1)^n = 2^n`, the desired identity follows.
